name: 36" x 36" Dreary Abstract Landscape Framed Wall Canvas - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description: Create visual interest in any space with the Dreary Abstract Landscape wall canvas from Threshold, designed with Studio McGee. The framed artwork, featuring a misty landscape, is a great pick to give your wall an accent piece that brings out your decor. This gorgeous canvas has the perfect size to be displayed on its own or with other artwork as part of a gallery wall. You could even prop it up against the wall on a cabinet or side table to bring any area to life.
